roa.docketEntryComment: Waiver of Defendant's Personal Presence (PC 977) Form
PEOPLE'S Motion to Continue UNDER PENAL COSE SECTION 1050
Order - Outgoing Transfer Order to Fresno county
CONFIDENTIAL Motion to Transfer Out to Other County ( to Fresno County)

/CAL: SENTENCE/BE/AJW/CH7:ISS:PROB  2 Y :PJ 25 D/CTS: 25 /DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION MONITORING BY THE ADULT PROBATION OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE APD/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION WITHIN 24 HOURS/X: DEFENDANT WILL SERVE180 DAYS IN JAIL, MINUS THE 25 DAYS CREDIT FOR JAIL, THE BALANCE WILL BE SERVED IN HOME DETENTION/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/RESTV3/SA1:ARIAN ALI, SHAMS NAZRUL, BLAS CASCO/SAORD3/SAORD/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 7/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 02-10-22/PPRF/ARBUCKLE/TWS/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:SUBPOENA RECORDS ENVELOPE #1 IS RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL WITH STIPULATION PURSUANT TO EC 1560-1561 BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/CONTD:SETTING PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWF/

/CAL:I & A, P & C/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/BAIL:75,000/CTORD:CONDITION OF BAIL DEFENDANT MUST COMPLY WITH CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED IN OPEN COURT TODAY/SAORD/SA1:SHAMS NAZRUL (18M), ARIAN ALI (18M), BLAS CASCO (21M)/SAORD2/SAORD3/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN M20/TE:4 HOURS/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE PEOPLE FILED MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE PEOPLE FILED EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE COURT SIGNEDORDER SEALING EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIL WITHOUT BAIL/X:MOTION TO DETAIN WAS NOT RULED ON/NB/X:NO BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/RESTR/CONTPROB/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:NO FURTHER APPEARANCES/
/CAL:TO SET/DAWT/X:THE PARTIES ARE NOT READY TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING,//CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 9/DOPU:NO DISPOSITION,/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X: THE PEOPLE FILE A MOTION TO CONTINUE UNDER PENAL CODE SECTION 1050/X: THE MOTION IS GRANTED/
